problem: ACOs, MSOs, payers, and health systems struggle to succeed in value-based care due to fragmented patient data, difficulty identifying at-risk populations, and inability to close care gaps efficiently while managing costs.
solution: Lightbeam Health Solutions provides an AI-enabled population health management platform serving 45M+ patients, offering risk adjustment optimization, quality measure optimization, remote patient monitoring, automated patient engagement, and provider score carding, delivering $5B+ in gross savings with 8-10X increase in care manager capacity.
